title: Remove profile setup popup, update headline, and fix admin login

requirements.text: Remove the 'Set up your profile' popup/modal (ProfileSetup component) so it no longer appears after login or anywhere in the application.
acceptanceCriteria: The ProfileSetup modal/dialog does not appear after a user logs in.
No 'Set up your profile' prompt is shown anywhere in the app.
The ProfileSetup component is either removed or never rendered.

requirements.text: Update the main hero headline in the Hero section to display 'Urban Thekedaar — We build structures for generations' as the primary headline text.

quotes: change the text Urban thekedaar we build structures for generations as a headline

acceptanceCriteria: The Hero section displays 'Urban Thekedaar — We build structures for generations' as the main headline.
The headline is visually prominent and styled consistently with the existing hero design.

requirements.text: Replace the admin panel's Internet Identity authentication with a hardcoded username/password login form. Use credentials: username 'admin' and password 'admin123'. The admin panel should be accessible only after successfully entering these credentials, with an 'Access Denied' state shown for incorrect credentials.

quotes: i am unable to login in admin panel saying access denied

acceptanceCriteria: The admin panel shows a login form with username and password fields instead of (or before) Internet Identity login.
Entering 'admin' / 'admin123' grants access to the admin dashboard.
Entering incorrect credentials shows an error message (e.g., 'Access Denied' or 'Invalid credentials').
After successful login, the admin panel content is fully accessible.
The admin session persists until the user logs out.

constraints: Use hardcoded credentials: username 'admin', password 'admin123' — do not store them in the backend.
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding a backend authentication system or changing the Motoko actor.
Implementing role-based access control changes in the backend.
Redesigning any sections other than the hero headline and admin login.
